meaning: n.[哲]新实在论者,[文艺]新现实主义者adj.[文艺]新现实主义的,[哲]新实在论
examples: So at a very early age I was exposed to all the Italian Neorealist classics, which had a profound effect on my psyche.
The story deftly navigates the intricacies of creative life in a repressive society, and Ghobadi brilliantly captures the vibrant city with the skill of a great neorealist.
